Idioma.MSG_Esta_seguro_de_que_desea_Generar_par: Are you sure that desires to generate for the employees selected?
Idioma.MSG_Debe_seleccionar_al_menos_un_emplead: Should select al except an employee before generating
Idioma.MSG_El_proceso_de_Generacion_de_Pago_de_: The Hours Payment Generation process was carried out satisfactorily
Idioma.LB_NoTienAutorizacionParaAccederEstaInfo: Does not have authorization to agree this information
